item.title: Are You at a Bad Dealership? Watch for These 10 Red Flags! | Part 3
item.description: Shady dealerships often give themselves away with subtle warning signs. What are the 10 red flags every buyer should spot before signing the deal—and how many have you already seen in action?

media:content.media:title: Are You at a Bad Dealership? Watch for These 10 Red Flags! | Part 3
media:content.media:description: Shady dealerships often give themselves away with subtle warning signs. What are the 10 red flags every buyer should spot before signing the deal—and how many have you already seen in action?

item.title: Ten more red flags that reveal a bad car dealership
item.description: Part two of the red flag series continues with ten more warning signs that should send you straight to the exit. Essential viewing before you sign anything at a dealership. Have you experienced any of these firsthand?

media:content.media:title: Ten more red flags that reveal a bad car dealership
media:content.media:description: Part two of the red flag series continues with ten more warning signs that should send you straight to the exit. Essential viewing before you sign anything at a dealership. Have you experienced any of these firsthand?

item.title: How a Crosstrek trade-in turned into a lifelineHow a Crosstrek trade-in turned into a lifeline
item.description: What started as a straightforward trade-in became something far more significant — a decision that ended up saving a job and changing everything. A real, relatable story about the unexpected ways a car deal can matter. Did your last trade-in surprise you?

media:content.media:title: How a Crosstrek trade-in turned into a lifelineHow a Crosstrek trade-in turned into a lifeline
media:content.media:description: What started as a straightforward trade-in became something far more significant — a decision that ended up saving a job and changing everything. A real, relatable story about the unexpected ways a car deal can matter. Did your last trade-in surprise you?

item.title: 10 red flags that reveal a bad car dealership
item.description: Not every dealership has your best interests at heart. Part one of this series covers the warning signs worth knowing before you sign anything — practical, experience-based advice that could save you time and money. Have you ever dealt with a dodgy dealership?

media:content.media:title: 10 red flags that reveal a bad car dealership
media:content.media:description: Not every dealership has your best interests at heart. Part one of this series covers the warning signs worth knowing before you sign anything — practical, experience-based advice that could save you time and money. Have you ever dealt with a dodgy dealership?

item.title: The mistake that could cost you up to $41,000
item.description: It might seem harmless — but this commonly overlooked action carries a legal penalty of up to $41,000. A timely heads-up on something far more people are getting wrong than you might expect. Are you unknowingly breaking this rule?

media:content.media:title: The mistake that could cost you up to $41,000
media:content.media:description: It might seem harmless — but this commonly overlooked action carries a legal penalty of up to $41,000. A timely heads-up on something far more people are getting wrong than you might expect. Are you unknowingly breaking this rule?

item.title: You can never be a man at his own game
item.description: There is a reason the saying exists — competing on someone else's terms rarely ends in your favour. A thoughtful look at the strategy behind finding your own edge rather than fighting on familiar ground. Do you agree with this idea?

media:content.media:title: You can never be a man at his own game
media:content.media:description: There is a reason the saying exists — competing on someone else's terms rarely ends in your favour. A thoughtful look at the strategy behind finding your own edge rather than fighting on familiar ground. Do you agree with this idea?
